begining_of_contract.text: วันอนุมัติเงินกู้

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.begining_of_contract , tab.loan_requestment_no , tab.ref_own_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT (CASE lag( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,1,null )over( order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract_thai , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) as coll_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) as coll_group_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_req_coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid , sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '01/04/2024' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) tab
